# Shale Gas Reservoirs

**Summary**: Unconventional gas reservoirs hosted in low-permeability shale rocks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015]] modeled a shale gas reservoir using dual porosity and Langmuir isotherm models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015]] Requires specific modeling for desorption and fracture behavior.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015]] Simulated using dual porosity and Langmuir isotherm models.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The model successfully accounted for gas desorption and stress-sensitive conductivity. ([[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015, p. 113]])
- [[2015-rammay|RAMMAY, 2015]] Not stated in source.
